description: Tasks within this category build upon tasks in the Endpoint Enrollment category, and configure the appropriate security standards, and best practices for day to day device management

managementTemplateSteps.displayName: Create an attack surface reduction (ASR) policy
managementTemplateSteps.description: This deployment creates an ASR policy that greatly reduces the ability for malicious users to infect and exploit endpoint. This set of tasks build upon the tasks in Endpoint enrollment. They're used to set up the appropriate security standards and best practices for day-to-day device management.
managementTemplateSteps.userImpact: Attack surface reduction policies protect your devices from potential malicious users and enhance device security.

informationLinks.displayName: Understand and use attack surface reduction (ASR)

versions.name: AttackSurfaceReductionPolicy

settings.name: name
settings.value: M365 Lighthouse- Attack Surface Reduction Policy

settings.name: blockCredentialStealing
settings.displayName: Block credential stealing from the windows local security authority subsystem (lsass.exe)

settings.name: blockExecuatableFiles
settings.displayName: Block executable files from running unless they meet prevalence, age or trusted list criterion

settings.name: blockProcessCreations
settings.displayName: Block process creations originating from PSExec and WMI commands

settings.name: blockPersistence
settings.displayName: Block persistence thru WMI event subscription

settings.name: blockExecutableContent
settings.displayName: Block executable content from email content and webmail

settings.name: blockExploitedVulnerableSignedDrivers
settings.displayName: Block abuse of exploited vulnerable signed drivers (Device)

values: @sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm,microsoftSense' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"policyId")

@sys.write([@sys.project([{IncludeResponseBodyInException:true} GET /beta/deviceManagement/configurationPolicies?$filter=name eq '[@name()]' and technologies eq 'mdm,microsoftSense' and platforms eq 'windows10'],"id")],"policyId")

lambdaDefinitions.value: select 'M365 Lighthouse- Attack Surface Reduction Policy'
